{
  "judge_id": "judge_2023_10_20",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Agent flags critical numerical contradiction and audits specific evidence-claim linkages but does not check every load-bearing claim.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing or wrong citation with bibliographic skepticism, but does not audit all load-bearing citations.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosed for some claims (citation, numbers) but not comprehensively marked for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Output mostly within scope with minor drifts in focus.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies harmful patterns without introducing new errors or regressions.",
    "RX.5": "No traceability of sources or reasons for changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: Agent flags critical numerical contradiction and audits specific evidence-claim linkages but does not check every load-bearing claim.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation with bibliographic skepticism, but does not audit all load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosed for some claims (citation, numbers) but not comprehensively marked for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output mostly within scope with minor drifts in focus.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns without introducing new errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: No traceability of sources or reasons for changes.
